AI Readiness Quiz

How Ready Are You to Navigate
AI, Your Team, and What Comes Next?

6 questions. Less than 3 minutes. Your personalized profile is waiting.

No fluff. No generic advice. Just an honest look at where you are so we can meet you there.

Question 1 of 5 0%

Before we start

Where are you standing today?

Question 1 of 5

When AI adoption decisions hit your desk, what is your actual authority to act on them?

Question 2 of 5

How would you describe the structure your team is actually operating in right now?

Question 3 of 5

When you walk into a leadership meeting carrying real strain, what usually shows up?

Question 4 of 5

How is AI adoption actually landing on your team's workload right now?

Question 5 of 5

What is the one thing you most need to move forward with confidence?

Question 1 of 5

When you think about how AI is changing your industry, what is your primary feeling?

Question 2 of 5

How would you describe your current career transition status?

Question 3 of 5

If you had to describe your current personal and professional strategy in one sentence, it would be:

Question 4 of 5

How are you currently using AI tools in your personal workflow?

Question 5 of 5

What is the number one thing you need right now to move forward with confidence?

Almost there! 100%

Your results are ready.

Enter your name and email to reveal your personalized profile and your recommended next step.

No spam. Ever. Your information is used only to deliver your results and relevant updates from Strategic Transformations.

Your Frictionless Manager Profile

You are The Overwhelmed Manager.

You are not a struggling manager. You are a competent operator absorbing the structural cost of a system that is asking you to lead AI adoption without giving you the authority, the clarity, or the recovery time to do it well. The strain you are carrying is real, and most of it is not yours. It is structural. The fact that you are still showing up tells me everything I need to know about your standing. What you need next is not another framework. It is a diagnosis honest enough to name what is breaking and a room that does not require you to perform.

UNMASK Pattern: RAA + ITC

Companies are actively removing middle management layers to fund AI investments. The managers still standing are carrying more responsibility, less authority, and the invisible coordination cost of teams that no longer have a structural home. You are not failing. You are bearing a structural asymmetry the org has not named.

Source: The Economic Times, 2026 reporting on US corporate restructuring.

What This Means For You

Before you can lead your team through anything, you need to see the architecture you are working inside. The Frictionless Manager Playbook Bootcamp gives you that diagnosis, the language to name it, and a 90-day plan that does not assume you have unlimited capacity to absorb more.

Learn More About the Bootcamp →

See the full Bootcamp page. No call required.

When you are ready, the next Frictionless Manager Bootcamp cohort opens in September 2026. See cohort details →

Your Frictionless Manager Profile

You are The Curious Manager.

You can see the friction clearly. You know AI is exposing structural problems your organization has not fixed, and you know your team is paying the cost of that gap. You have ideas, you have read the right things, and you have already tried more than people give you credit for. What you do not have yet is a sequenced playbook that fits the actual structure you are leading inside, and a peer room of other managers running the same diagnostic in real time. That is the gap the Bootcamp is built to close.

UNMASK Pattern: SSS + ABAI

79% of organizations report struggling to implement AI, and 54% of executives say it is tearing their company apart. The structure is the variable. The Bootcamp is where you fix the variable instead of the people.

Source: WRITER Enterprise AI Adoption, 2026.

What This Means For You

You do not need more theory. You need a clear, ordered playbook you can run on Monday morning, with the diagnostic tools to know what to fix first and the language to bring leadership along with you.

Register for the September 2026 Cohort →

Limited seats available. Cohort begins September 2026.

Want more context first? See the full Bootcamp page →

Your Frictionless Manager Profile

You are The Strategic Manager.

You are not the manager looking for permission to lead. You are the operator who has already built something that works, and you are sharp enough to know that what works today will not survive what is coming. You are looking for a stress test, a peer room of other strategic operators, and a structural lens that lets you pressure-test the plan you already have. You are also, most likely, the person inside your organization who will decide whether your team gets a Bootcamp seat or not. Both of those conversations are the same room.

UNMASK Pattern: LMI

73% of CEOs report stress about AI strategy, with many fearing job loss if they fail to deliver. The strongest plans break first when the leader has nowhere to be honest. The Bootcamp is built to be that room.

Source: WRITER Enterprise AI Adoption, 2026.

What This Means For You

You do not need a starting point. You need a proving ground and a structural diagnostic you can run on your own organization. The Bootcamp is that room, whether you come as an individual operator or scope a cohort for your leadership team.

Book an Executive Briefing →

A qualifying conversation to scope a cohort for your team.

Coming as an individual operator? See September 2026 cohort details →

Your Strategic Reset Profile

You are The Overwhelmed Operator.

You are carrying an invisible load, and the pressure to "figure out AI" on top of a career transition is exhausting. You are not behind. You are just at capacity. The Strategic Reset Intensive is designed exactly for this moment. It is a space to stop reacting, catch your breath, and build a personal strategy that actually fits your life.

What This Means For You

Before you can build a strategy, you need space to think clearly. The SRI gives you that space, a structured reset, and a personal AI toolkit you can actually use without adding to your overwhelm.

Apply for the Strategic Reset Intensive →

Limited seats available. Applications are reviewed personally by Nikki Cates.

Your Strategic Reset Profile

You are The Curious Contributor.

You see the shift. You know the rules of the economy are changing and you know you need to pivot, but you are stuck on the "how." You have the ambition, but you lack the blueprint. The Strategic Reset Intensive will give you the exact framework you need to move from curiosity to execution, including how to use AI tools for your own career leverage.

What This Means For You

You do not need more information. You need a structured plan and a room full of women who are building alongside you. The SRI is that room.

Apply for the Strategic Reset Intensive →

Limited seats available. Applications are reviewed personally by Nikki Cates.

Your Strategic Reset Profile

You are The Strategic Architect.

You are already ahead of the curve. You are moving strategically and using the tools available to you. But in an unstable economy, a good plan needs to be stress-tested. The Strategic Reset Intensive is the room you need to refine your economic positioning, upgrade your AI workflows, and build alongside other high-performing women who are playing at your level.

What This Means For You

You do not need a starting point. You need a proving ground. The SRI gives you the strategic friction and peer-level accountability to take your plan from good to unshakeable.

Apply for the Strategic Reset Intensive →

Limited seats available. Applications are reviewed personally by Nikki Cates.
